title: Composition of GI microbiota of adult porcines from pork breeding enterprises in the South of Russia
author: Ermakov, Alexey
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
The dataset presents data on 16S rRNA sequencing of the microbiota of different parts of the GI tract (stomach, duodenum, small intestine, colon and rectum), as well as faeces of healthy adult porcines sampled from pork breeding enterprises in the South of Russia  
  01_fastq.zip  archive stores raw data 
  02_rma.zip  &  03_biom.zip  archive stores processed data 
  04_lists.zip  archive stores results of the analysis 
  05_figures.zip  archive stores visualization of results
steps_raw:
